impact: fitting_tool.html builds many rows via innerHTML string-concat with inline onclick/onerror/onmouseover/onmouseout attrs embedded in the string (lines 627, 653, 720, 990, 1295, 1297, 1397, 1405, 1444, 1446 — 36 inline handlers total). These were excluded from T-031 round 3 because the migration script can't safely regex into JS string literals. Right approach: refactor the relevant renderers to use document.createElement + addEventListener, OR templatize via a hidden <template> element. Until done, this file remains the single largest blocker for T-033's unsafe-inline drop.
title: CSP T-031 follow-up: fitting_tool.html innerHTML refactor
